description_long: This object is a set of three folding utility knives with olive green handles and matte black blades. Each knife features a robust, contoured handle with a visible thumb rest, finger grooves, and a lanyard hole at the rear. The blades are short, wide, and single-edged with a slight drop point, and each is marked with white text. The handles have textured grip panels and a few metallic screws or rivets for structural integrity. The knives are shown in various states of blade deployment, highlighting their folding mechanism. The overall design is tactical and utilitarian, suitable for everyday carry or outdoor use.
description: A set of three olive green folding utility knives with matte black drop-point blades and contoured, textured handles.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the slim profile of the knives, emphasizing the handle width and alignment of the blades.
description_view_1: Side view displaying all three knives with blades partially or fully extended, highlighting the blade shape, handle contours, and grip texture.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the handles and the alignment of the knives in a closed or partially open state.
description_view_3: Opposite side view of the knives, showing the blade deployment and the ergonomic design of the handles.
attribute_handle_design: contoured olive green polymer with textured grip panels, finger grooves, and lanyard hole
